nasb.text: Then Pharaoh hurriedly called for Moses and Aaron, and he said, “I have sinned against the Lord your God and against you.

esv.text: Then Pharaoh hastily called Moses and Aaron and said, “I have sinned against the Lord your God, and against you.

cnv.text: 於是，法老急忙把摩西和亞倫召了來，說：“我得罪了耶和華你們的　神，也得罪了你們。

ccb.text: 法老急忙召见摩西和亚伦，对他们说：“我得罪了你们的上帝耶和华，又得罪了你们。
